ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "nih_record_id" TEXT /* User ID for the participant based on NIH records */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant in years */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Biological sex assigned at birth */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant gave consent */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the participant is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the age data entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant's ID */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant when data was collected */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the participant */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Site where the age data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alcohol_consumption" (
  "alcohol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the alcohol consumption entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant's ID */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of alcohol consumption */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of alcohol consumed */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of alcohol consumption */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the alcohol consumption data was collected */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Site where the alcohol consumption data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alcohol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alcohol_consumption_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_data" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sex data entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant's ID */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Biological sex assigned at birth */,
  "gender_identity" TEXT /* Gender identity of the participant */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Site where the sex data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sex_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missing_value_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the missing value code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the missing value code */,
  "code_type" TEXT /* Type of missing value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the collection date entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant's ID */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Site where the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_dates_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_enumeration" (
  "enum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the enumeration */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question ID */,
  "value" TEXT /* Enumeration value corresponding to the response */,
  "label" TEXT /* Human-readable label for the enumeration value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the enumeration value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_enumeration_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the question */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Terms associated with the question */,
  "datatype" TEXT /* Data type of the question (e.g., integer, string) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement if applicable */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality issue */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant's ID */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality issue */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was noted */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant's ID */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question ID */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response given by the participant */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Site where the response was collected */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
